description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the Acme.Template solution. Perform a complete deep rename of the solution and project to Acme.InventoryAPI. This includes renaming all relevant filesystem folders and files (.sln and .csproj), updating the project's Assembly name and Default namespace, and refactoring all code namespaces to Acme.InventoryAPI. The task is complete when the solution builds successfully with the new naming convention.
